Task description line 3 and export_result.sh verification
setup_task.sh downloads from GitHub jpwhite3/northwind-SQLite3 repository
Direct query of northwind.db: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ShipCountry) FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate IS NOT NULL
Direct query of northwind.db: Speedy Express, United Package, Federal Shipping
Direct query of northwind.db: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate IS NOT NULL

privileged_info_summary: The Northwind Freight Optimization task uses the real Northwind sample database (non-synthetic data), sourced from the publicly available jpwhite3/northwind-SQLite3 GitHub repository. The database contains 21 distinct shipping countries, 3 shippers (Speedy Express, United Package, Federal Shipping), and 16,261 orders with shipped dates. The task requires creating a view named v_country_shipper_stats to analyze average freight costs by country and shipper, then exporting a routing guide CSV with columns: Country, Recommended_Shipper, Avg_Cost (rounded to 2 decimals), and Potential_Savings (the difference between highest and lowest shipper cost per country, rounded to 2 decimals). All metadata file paths and view names match the task specifications.
